label: Rollbar
description: Monitor, track, and triage errors and exceptions from your applications in real time.

form.title: Connect Rollbar
form.subtitle: Paste your Rollbar project access token to give Anton access to your error data.

methods.label: Project Access Token
methods.description: Paste a read-scoped project access token from Rollbar's Project Settings. Quickest setup — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Find your Rollbar Project Access Token

1. Log in to [Rollbar](https://rollbar.com) and select the project you want to connect.
2. In the left sidebar, go to **Settings → Project Access Tokens**.
3. Find an existing token with the `read` scope, or click **Create a new access token** and select `read` as the scope.
4. Copy the token string.
5. Paste it into the **Project Access Token** field below.
6. Optionally enter your **Account Slug** and **Project Slug** (visible in your Rollbar URL: `rollbar.com/<account>/<project>`) to scope requests precisely.

## Notes

- Use a `read`-scoped token for safety; Anton does not need write access.
- Tokens are shown in full on the Project Access Tokens page — you can return any time to copy them again.
- If you need to revoke access, return to **Settings → Project Access Tokens** and delete or regenerate the token.

fields.name: project_access_token
fields.label: Project Access Token
fields.description: Found under Project → Settings → Project Access Tokens. Use a read-scoped token.

fields.name: account_slug

fields.description: Your Rollbar account name, visible in the URL: rollbar.com/<account>/<project>.

fields.name: project_slug
fields.label: Project Slug
fields.description: The project name portion of your Rollbar URL. Helps Anton scope API requests to the correct project.

methods.label: Account Access Token
methods.description: Use an account-level access token for cross-project access. Suitable for teams managing multiple Rollbar projects from one connection.
methods.how_to:
## Find your Rollbar Account Access Token

1. Log in to [Rollbar](https://rollbar.com) and click your account name in the top-right corner.
2. Go to **Account Settings → Account Access Tokens**.
3. Copy an existing token or click **Create a new access token**.
4. Paste the token into the **Account Access Token** field below.

## Notes

- Account access tokens grant access across all projects in the account — use with care.
- Prefer a project-scoped token (the **Project Access Token** method) if you only need one project.
- Revoke tokens at any time from **Account Settings → Account Access Tokens**.

fields.name: account_access_token
fields.label: Account Access Token
fields.description: Found under Account Settings → Account Access Tokens. Grants cross-project access.
